series_metadata.series_description: Investigatory files including reports, correspondence, medical and other records gathered by investigators.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain paper records until final Board action, then destroy, unless needed for longer period of time based on legal or administrative significance; if complaint closed without Board action, retain paper records 3 years from the date the complaint is made, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain electronic record 1 year after final action or date complaint is closed, then delete, unless needed for longer period of time based on legal or administrative significance., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
